member.name: M:GTA.Entity.DetachFragmentPart(System.Int32)
member.summary:
Detachs a fragment part of this
. Can create a new
.

returns.para:
if a new
is created; otherwise,
.

Returning
does not necessarily mean detaching the part did not change the
in any ways. For example, detaching seat_f for
will return
but the
on the front seat will not be able to sit properly.
